allow: Bash(python3 -m spectool.cli inject --src /tmp/sum.c --out /tmp/sum.acsl.c --func sum --acsl 'requires n >= 0; requires \\valid\(a+\(0..n-1\)\); ensures \\result == s; assigns \\nothing;' --loops '[{"line":5,"acsl":"loop invariant 0 <= i <= n; loop assigns i, s;"}]')
Bash(python3 -m spectool.cli contracts put --proj /tmp/proj --fqn sum --signature "int sum\(int*,int\)" --acsl 'ensures \\result==s;' --wp Pass_5_5)
